description: A real event emerges from a side conversation between Alice and Bob while the main group chats socially. Carol and Dave are not attending.

events.title: Tech Panel Discussion
events.reasoning: Alice invites Bob to a tech panel discussion on Tuesday evening at 7 PM at the Innovation Hub on Market Street, running until about 9 PM. Bob accepts. Carol and Dave are explicitly not attending (sold out). Alice confirms she will add it to their calendars.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 real event in a side conversation: tech panel discussion on Tuesday at 7 PM for Alice and Bob only.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24. The social small talk (weekend discussion) contains no calendar events. Carol and Dave explicitly cannot attend.
